$comment: Computed by pipeline/elected-officials/score_officials.py as a JOIN of data/elected-officials/votes.json against data/legislation/bills.json + manual_review.json. Refreshed by GitHub Actions whenever votes or bills change. Do not hand-edit — your changes will be overwritten on the next pipeline run.
